title: Nadhiyile Song Lyrics Doo Songs Lyrics
stanzas:
Singer : Silambarasan
Song: Nadhiyile
MOvie : Doo
Music : Abishek-Lawrence
Lyrics : Na Muthukumar

Nadhiyile, Azhai Ondru, marubadi mithakuthe
Gnabahathil kadhavugal,adikkadi thirakuthe
CHinna chinnathaai, undhan ennam nulaindhu
Chitravadhayaai unnai kollukindrathe
Enna mandhiram iru kannil seikindraai
Idhayam undhan vali sellu kindrathe..

Oru paarvaiyaale, poothathu penne
Adi poothathu penne, en kadhal pookal
Vizhiyoram meendum, vandhathu penne
Adi vandhathu penne, naam pazhakiya naatkal

Kaadhal enbadhu enna privin valithaane
Penne penne pirivilthaane anbinai unnardhene
Dhinam dhinam unnai ninaika vaithaai
Manam athai meendum thulirka vaithaai 
Ganamindri ennai parakavaithaai
Vaana villil ennai nadaka vaithai

Oru paarvaiyaale, poothathu penne
Adi poothathu penne, en kadhal pookal
Vizhiyoram meendum, vandhathu penne
Adi vandhathu penne, naam pazhakiya naatkal

Pattampoochi meendum endhan viralil varukirathe
Pagalum Iravum innam puriyaatha mayakathai tharukirathe
Nizha oli athai rasika vaithaai
kaanakalil ennai vasika vaithaai
Nenjam engum vandhu innika vaithaai
Neram kaalam athai maraka vaithaai

Oru paarvaiyaale, poothathu penne
Adi poothathu penne, en kadhal pookal
Vizhiyoram meendum, vandhathu penne
Adi vandhathu penne, naam pazhakiya naatkal

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Nadhiyile?

The song Nadhiyile expresses deep romantic feelings and the beauty of love, capturing the essence of longing and affection.

What is the plot context of the movie Doo?

The movie Doo revolves around themes of love and relationships, making this song a perfect fit for its narrative.

Who is the singer of Nadhiyile?

The song is sung by the talented Simbu, known for his emotive singing style.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Nadhiyile was composed by the duo Abishek-Lawrence, who are known for their catchy tunes.

When was Nadhiyile released?

Nadhiyile was released on June 19, 2011, and has since become a favorite among fans.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Nadhiyile, the protagonist expresses his heartfelt emotions towards his beloved, highlighting the beauty and complexity of love. The song's soothing melody and romantic lyrics create an enchanting atmosphere that resonates with listeners. It serves as a pivotal moment in the movie Doo, encapsulating the essence of love and longing. With Simbu's captivating vocals and the evocative composition, this track evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth, making it a timeless romantic anthem.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nadhiyile from Doo is a mesmerizing romantic track that beautifully captures the essence of love. Simbu's soulful vocals combined with the enchanting music by Abishek-Lawrence create a captivating experience. This song is sure to resonate with anyone who has ever been in love, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: In the river, there's a beauty that keeps coming back. In the world, doors keep opening. Little by little, your thoughts are becoming a picture that captures you. What magic is happening in your eyes? Your heart is revealing your pain.
With just one glance, the girl blooms. My love blooms like flowers. The memories come back again, girl. Those memories are returning, as we remember the days gone by.

What is love? It is a sweet pain. Girl, girl, it is a pain of separation. Every day, I think of you. My heart keeps reminding me of that. Without music, you make me wander. You make me walk in the sky.
With just one glance, the girl blooms. My love blooms like flowers. The memories come back again, girl. Those memories are returning, as we remember the days gone by.

The butterfly is coming back to my finger. Day and night, it brings an unexplainable magic. The true light makes me feel it in my eyes. My heart is coming today everywhere. Time is making me forget that.
With just one glance, the girl blooms. My love blooms like flowers. The memories come back again, girl. Those memories are returning, as we remember the days gone by.
